creator: astrotechdroidmrusli@gmail.com
text:
Hi

I am currently using the latest verison Chromium Web Browsers version 83.0.4103.116 from FreeBSD 12.1 ports. And I am still having issues reading emails with my Yahoo mail. I cannot seems to read my Yahoo mails as the cursor keeps loading and loading and loading with any sign to load any emails from yahoo. This is a software bug that I need to address to your attention. Can you please fix this issues as this is very annoying.
